movie.actors: Sylvester Stallone, Robert Loggia, Susan Blakely, Rick Zumwalt
movie.plot: Tough trucker Lincoln Hawk is determined to win back his son and triumph at the world arm wrestling championships.
movie.title: Over the Top
movie.writer: Gary Conway (story), David Engelbach (story), Stirling Silliphant (screenplay), Sylvester Stallone (screenplay)
